AttributeList.Text: Operation Modes Unit State 0=Protection 0=Stopped 1=Economy 1=Checking-up 2=PreComfort 2=Preheating 3=Comfor 3=Starting 4=Auto(Scheduler) 4=RecirculatingOperation (Protection) 5=Sustained Mode (Economy setpoints) 6=Sustained Mode (PreComfort setpoints) 7=Comfort operation 8=Stopping 9=Blocking
